summary: Iteration 38: Read-Aloud Recording System and Audio Book Collection - CRITICAL BUG FIXED. The recording and audio book API routes were defined AFTER app.include_router() call, causing all new endpoints to return 404. Fixed by moving app.include_router() to end of file. All 19 backend tests pass. Frontend tabs verified working.

critical.issue: FIXED - Routes were defined after app.include_router(api_router) at line 5752, so none were registered. Moved include_router to end of file.

critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: In server.py, all recording and audio book routes (lines 5813-6250) were defined AFTER app.include_router(api_router) at line 5752. This meant none of these routes were registered with FastAPI.
Fix: Moved app.include_router(api_router) to the end of the file (line 6254) so all routes are included.
All 19 backend API tests now pass
Guardian Portal has 'Audio Memories' and 'Audio Books' tabs working correctly
Admin Portal has 'Audio Books' tab with settings panel working
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - features show empty state which is expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recording and audio book features fully tested. Bug fixed - routes now properly registered. Empty states display correctly since no recordings exist yet. The ReadAloudRecorder component exists but requires actual audio recording to test upload flow.

bug_fix_details.issue: All recording and audio book endpoints returning 404 Not Found
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Moved app.include_router(api_router) to end of file after all route definitions

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real implementations. Whisper transcription requires actual audio file.
